overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city resembling Night City. The player walks along a waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and holographic advertisements, descends briefly to the canal water level, then continues through a commercial district with towering skyscrapers and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: camera descends from sidewalk level down to the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade observing the futuristic architecture and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the street parallel to the waterfront

entered.detail: tall futuristic cylindrical building with red structural elements at the base and landing platforms
tropical palm trees lining the edge of the promenade walkway
large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful futuristic advertisements
urban waterway separating the promenade from the industrial district
angled yellow metal barriers along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic waterfront promenade with orange paved tiles. The silver cylindrical tower dominates the right side across the water, while palm trees and bright neon billboards line the left. The scene is relatively quiet with sparse traffic and no pedestrians visible.

events.description: camera ascends back up from water level to the main sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crouching down at the water's edge to view the canal and surrounding industrial architecture from a lower vantage point

entered.detail: tall industrial structure with large white 06 signage visible across the water
elevated walkway or transit bridge spanning across the canal
lowered concrete access platform at the water's edge with industrial pipes

segments.scene_description: The camera drops down to water level, providing a close-up view of the canal water and concrete platform. The industrial building with the 06 sign becomes visible across the water, and the silver tower is now seen from a lower angle across the canal. The perspective emphasizes the industrial infrastructure and overhead bridges.

events.description: green holographic advertisement becomes visible on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk passing various storefronts and observing the holographic displays

notable_agents.action: person in casual clothing walking toward the camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: glowing green holographic display projecting a rotating geometric shape
raised pedestrian bridge or transit line running above the street level

segments.scene_description: Back at sidewalk level, the walk continues past palm trees and vibrant neon billboards. A green holographic advertisement appears on the right, projecting a rotating geometric shape. The water canal remains visible to the right but becomes more distant as the path curves slightly toward a commercial intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with towering corporate buildings

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the massive skyscrapers and overhead structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection area looking up at the massive architecture and navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction
purple sports car driving through the intersection crosswalk

entered.detail: massive dark glass corporate tower with multiple holographic billboards attached to the facade
industrial metal walkway or pipe structure connecting buildings at upper levels

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection, the camera looks up at a towering glass skyscraper covered in advertisements. The area becomes busier with moderate pedestrian traffic and vehicles passing through. The industrial building with the 06 sign reappears on the left, and the green holographic display remains prominent on the right as the walk continues through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, neon-lit waterfront promenade into the bustling heart of a dense commercial district. It begins by gliding along orange paved tiles past palm trees and bright billboards, with a massive silver cylindrical tower dominating the skyline across the water. As the camera drops down to the water level, the perspective shifts to emphasize the industrial infrastructure of the canal, bringing a concrete platform and a building marked with a 06 sign into sharp focus. The scene then ascends back to the sidewalk, curving past a rotating green holographic advertisement as the quiet promenade gradually gives way to a more crowded urban environment. Finally, the camera looks up toward a towering glass skyscraper covered in ads at a major intersection, where the atmosphere transforms into a busy urban canyon filled with pedestrians and passing vehicles.
